name: Heimdall
description: Organize your most used web sites in a simple way
compose:
name: slashnode-heimdall
services:
  server:
    image: linuxserver/heimdall:2.7.6
    container_name: heimdall
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - server_config:/config
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:7392:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_config:
    name: slashnode-heimdall_server_config
